summary: A newly formed party of adventurers, including the protagonist Hyunwoo, sets out to hunt goblins and a Hobgoblin boss. Despite initial skepticism about some members, the party performs adequately against regular goblins, with Hyunwoo showcasing exceptional skill. However, during the Hobgoblin boss fight, Hyunwoo feels unsupported by his teammates, who hesitate and make mistakes, forcing him to largely solo the powerful mutant boss. After Hyunwoo single-handedly defeats the Hobgoblin, his party members praise him while taking credit for the shared loot, leading Hyunwoo to quickly depart, wary of potential betrayal, and celebrate his personal achievement of reaching Level 10 and qualifying for a class advancement.
key_moments: A new party is formed, with some members expressing skepticism about each other's abilities.
The party successfully hunts regular goblins, with Hyunwoo proving his combat prowess.
During the Hobgoblin boss fight, Hyunwoo feels unsupported by his teammates and single-handedly defeats the magic-wielding boss.
After the victory, Hyunwoo quickly takes one item and leaves, distrusting his party members, and confirms he has reached Level 10 for a class advancement.
